title: woodsia alpina var. bellii
intro: Woodsia alpina var. bellii, also known as the Bell's woodsia fern, is a variety of the Woodsia alpina species, a type of fern that is native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Woodsia alpina var. bellii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Woodsia alpina var. bellii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
